exemplar.title: Prompt number 17: Why do we seek knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: Prompt number 17: Why do we seek knowledge?

strengths: Three specific real-world objects are clearly identified and situated in authentic contexts
Coherent links are made between each object and the chosen prompt, supported by concrete details
Justifications for inclusion draw on appropriate evidence and citations
The exhibition demonstrates a clear manifestation of TOK in the real world
weaknesses: Analysis occasionally drifts into descriptive background rather than probing TOK concepts
Limited explicit use of TOK vocabulary and comparative discussion across objects
Some assertions (e.g., parental motivations) are unsupported or imprecise
References and citation formatting are inconsistent
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition satisfies the descriptors for the 7â8 band by clearly identifying three objects with authentic contexts and providing coherent, evidence-based links to the prompt âWhy we seek knowledge.â Each objectâs inclusion is well justified through concrete details, demonstrating how TOK manifests in real-world scenarios. However, the analysis sometimes remains descriptive, with limited engagement in deeper TOK concepts, vocabulary, and cross-object comparison. Occasional unsupported assertions and inconsistent referencing prevent the work from reaching the conceptual depth and precision of the top band. On balance, the strengths in structure, evidence, and clear TOK relevance merit a score of 7.

annotations.comment: The student clearly states the prompt, providing a coherent starting point for the exhibitionâs exploration of âWhy we seek knowledge.â This explicit framing anchors each object in the TOK inquiry.

The object title is succinct, but the student should immediately include its specific real-world context (e.g., excavation site and museum location) to strengthen the link to authentic knowledge contexts.
The inclusion of the tablet image effectively illustrates the artefact, enhancing the connection between the visual and textual components of the exhibition.

The environmental data on ancient Mesopotamia offers rich background but shifts focus from how mathematical ways of knowing drive survival. Refine the analysis to probe how reasoning and measurement facilitated strategic planning.

The commentary for Object 1 remains largely descriptive and offers limited engagement with TOK concepts such as how knowledge is justified. To deepen analysis, discuss explicitly how mathematical calculation embodies a way of knowing.

The argument relies heavily on historical and environmental context but offers minimal exploration of how knowledge is constructed or justified within TOK. Introduce discussion of knowledge frameworks to strengthen the justification.
How might this example illustrate specific ways of knowing (e.g., perception, reasoning) beyond background context? Posing such a question could guide deeper TOK exploration.
The student clearly identifies the second object with its title and source, situating the brochure in its authentic context.
Explicitly connect the brochureâs features to the chosen TOK prompt by stating how specialized medical knowledge exemplifies extrinsic motivations for seeking knowledge.
The photographic caption is clear, but consider including full citation details directly beneath figures to ensure academic rigor and traceability of sources.
The claim about parental motivations is anecdotal and unsupported. Strengthen this justification by citing empirical studies or data on educational investment motivations.
The analysis of course cost effectively illustrates extrinsic motivation and aligns with the promptâs focus on professional status.
To elevate this section into TOK territory, integrate references to specific ways of knowing (e.g., reason, language) or knowledge areas (e.g., human sciences) related to medical training.
Provide comparative data (e.g., average cost of similar experiences) to substantiate cost claims and ensure that evidence is precise rather than approximate.
The third object is clearly named, but including the date and location of acquisition would strengthen its specific real-world context.
The inclusion of a personal artefact enriches the exhibition through personal relevance; however, the caption could specify provenance and acquisition details to enhance authenticity.
The comparison between harmonica and high-status instruments is insightful, yet the student should discuss how informal learning reflects specific ways of knowing, such as intuition or emotion.
This section lacks explicit reference to the chosen TOK prompt. Clearly link personal fulfillment to âWhy we seek knowledgeâ to maintain focus and coherence.
The conclusion effectively summarises the three motives but could be strengthened by comparing across objects to highlight contrasts and common patterns in knowledge-seeking.
Consider explicitly naming the TOK prompt in your conclusion to reinforce the central theme and clearly link each object back to the IA question.
How does personal curiosity compare to survival and professional motives as epistemic drivers? Reflecting on this could deepen the conceptual analysis.
The bibliography is present but entries follow inconsistent formats. Ensure all citations adhere to a single style guide (e.g., APA or MLA) as required.
Citing ChatGPT may not meet IB academic standards. Replace with authoritative sources or clarify the role of AI-generated content within a TOK exploration.
The Ashmolean citation contains residual formatting tags and a malformed URL. Revise to correct these artifacts and ensure full, accessible links.
Relying on Wikipedia for historical context can weaken academic rigor. Where possible, supplement with peer-reviewed or primary sources to strengthen credibility.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
